Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Cation-independent O-methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU01020}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=L-tyrosine + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 3-methyl-L-tyrosine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:41428, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:58315, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:78239; EC=2.1.1.304; Evidence={ECO:0000303|PubMed:22187429};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: C-methyltransferase that mediates the methylation of tyrosine into 3-methyl-L-tyrosine (3-Me-Tyr) in biosynthesis of saframycin A, a potent antitumor antibiotic that belongs to the tetrahydroisoquinoline family. Involved in biosynthesis of 3-hydroxy-5-methyl-O-methyltyrosine (3-OH-5-Me-OMe-Tyr), a core structure of saframycin A. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:19494690, ECO:0000269|PubMed:22187429}.
